title: philadelphus lewisii var. gordonianus
intro: Philadelphus lewisii var. gordonianus, also known as the fragrant or mock orange, is a fragrant flowering shrub native to western North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Philadelphus lewisii var. gordonianus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
